TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Fata' an = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Kwangfusyang ka alang Fata' an. 1,988 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 5,474 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 54% niqan 2,968 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 46% niqan 2,506 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis50%, Tayal1%, Truku1%, ni rahuq na o2%.
S.PHON: = *ata' an = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən kwaŋ*usjaŋ ka alaŋ *ata' an. *,*** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, tajal*%, tɾuku*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Fata' an = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Kwangfusyang ka alang Fata' an. 1,988 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 5,474 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 54% niqan 2,968 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 46% niqan 2,506 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis50%, Tayal1%, Truku1%, ni rahuq na o2%.
S.PHON: = *ata' an = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən kwaŋ*usjaŋ ka alaŋ *ata' an. *,*** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, tajal*%, tɾuku*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
